jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Milton
jsonLd.description:
Milton is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Milton:
Milton is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milton!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
